creator: dennis.batchelor@se-eng.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD webmaster,

Please add Sage Electronic Engineering (https://www.se-eng.com) to the Vendors list at https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/software.html

Company: Sage Electronic Engineering
Site: https://www.se-eng.com

About: Sage Electronic supports booting FreeBSD on x86 embedded computers with Intel and AMD processors. SageBIOS, a commercial distribution of coreboot (www.coreboot.org) and other open source firmware resources, is the leading open source BIOS alternative to UEFI BIOS on x86 hardware. Sage Electronic is a top contributor to coreboot, the only open source firmware compatible with Intel and AMD processors. Each SageBIOS Board Support Package supports booting to FreeBSD, Windows, Linux, RTOS, and legacy operating systems. Eliminate royalties, obtain source code, and request custom features such as security and fast booting. Read more at https://www.se-eng.com

Thanks!
